prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (M177 DE40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, billet compressor wheels, and 1.22 A/R turbine housings, paired with a Weistec high-flow downpipe system (catless) and a custom-tuned ECU flash via HP Tuners with 1.3 bar boost targeting 850+ WHP on 100 octane fuel

Full Weistec Engineering drivetrain reinforcement package including a billet aluminum differential cover, upgraded 40% carbon fiber driveshaft, and a Quaife ATB helical LSD with 4.11 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration

Bespoke suspension overhaul with KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm front/60mm rear ride height adjustability), paired with H&R Monoball front subframe bushings and a full set of SuperPro polyurethane control arm bushings for razor-sharp handling
estetica: Rocket Bunny Widebody Kit for GLE63 S (Type 3) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, aggressive front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler extension, finished in Selenite Grey Magno with matte black accents

OEM+ AMG Night Package II styling cues including blacked-out AMG grille with carbon fiber inserts, gloss black 22" AMG forged wheels (staggered 10.5x22 ET30 front / 12.5x22 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35R22 front, 325/30R22 rear)

Full interior carbon fiber upgrade via Carbonskin, including AMG Performance steering wheel in Alcantara with red contrast stitching, custom Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery), and a rear seat delete with a custom carbon fiber cargo panel
